//: Satellite imagery is ~2 TB in full — too large to mirror. Keep only z0-12
locally (~700 GB) and serve z16+ straight from the CDN, stacked via VPL.
build: convert only z0-12 from the CDN into the local subset.
serveCurrent: local subset for z0-12, CDN for z16+ (first-match + filters).
serveTransitional defaults to remote (whole dataset from the CDN while rebuilding).
name: satellite

serveCurrent.pipeline: from_stacked [ from_container filename="{LOCAL}/satellite.versatiles" | filter level_max=12, from_container filename="{CDN}/satellite.versatiles" | filter level_min=16 ]

//: Served as 'osm' (/tiles/osm/, local osm.versatiles) but sourced from the
prebuilt 'osm-landcover.versatiles' on the CDN — osm + landcover merged
upstream with the combined attribution already baked in. Plain mirror:
download the CDN file to local disk; serveTransitional defaults to remote
(the CDN osm-landcover file while the local copy is downloading).
landcover-vectors is NOT served on its own.
name: osm
